message:
test(demo): add 16 tests for Explainability Cockpit mouse + keyboard interactions

Tests cover: focus via number keys, n/p scroll, arrow scroll, clamp bounds,
mouse click panel focus, mouse scroll timeline, pause toggle, clear evidence,
keybindings list, tick-when-paused behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
